name: Neapolitan Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the fresh peaches and cut them into halves, removing the pits.
2. Cut the peach halves into small cubes (or use 8 canned-peach halves).
3. Add sugar to the peach cubes and stir well.
4. Pour in orange juice and lemon juice, then stir.
5. Add 1/4 cup of apricot brandy to the mixture and stir thoroughly.
6. Transfer the mixture to a container and freeze until ready to serve.
Serve with 1 tablespoon of apricot brandy floated on top (or more liqueur if desired).
